info.title: ServiceHub API
info.description: Review-4 REST API documentation for ServiceHub.

RoleHeader.name: x-role
RoleHeader.description: Role used for RBAC. Allowed values: customer, provider, admin, arbitrator.

ActorHeader.name: x-actor-id
ActorHeader.description: In-memory actor user id for the selected role. Required for protected APIs.

email.description: Email address for the selected role.

description.example: Complete home cleaning service with verified staff.
The delivered service did not match the agreed scope.

summary.example: The customer is entitled to a refund.

message.example: Please contact me about my booking.
